overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest path at night, illuminated by a magical light on his shoulder. The character travels from a wooded trail with stone walls past rocky outcroppings and across a stone bridge, encountering another figure at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone wall and well structure

events.description: passing by a stone well structure with wooden barriers on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path, examining the surroundings with a magical light illuminating the way

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest illuminated by the character's shoulder light
low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the path
tall trees with autumn foliage surrounding the trail
ruined stone well with wooden barriers beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the left. The magical light on his shoulder casts dynamic shadows on the ground. Around the 5-second mark, he passes a stone well structure with wooden barriers, continuing through dense autumn forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest passage with large boulders

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path, navigating past large rock formations on the right

entered.detail: massive moss-covered boulder formation looming beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more rugged section of forest where large rock outcroppings appear on the right side. The stone wall remains visible but recedes into the distance on the left. The environment feels more enclosed as the character walks between the rock formation and the remaining forest vegetation.

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest as the path curves toward an opening

segments.scene_description: Leaving the rocky section behind, the trail continues through denser forest vegetation. The stone wall and rock formations exit the frame as the path opens slightly, revealing more of the stormy night sky through the canopy. The ground remains a dirt trail with grass and undergrowth on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge over water with NPC encounter

events.description: dirt path transitions to cobblestone bridge with stone railings
NPC character becomes visible standing on the bridge ahead

agents.ego_description: walking onto the stone bridge toward another character standing ahead

notable_agents.action: standing still on the stone bridge ahead, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: ancient cobblestone bridge with weathered stone railings crossing over water
dark water visible through the bridge railings on the left side
figure standing on the bridge ahead wearing dark clothing

segments.scene_description: The forest trail gives way to an ancient stone bridge with cobblestone paving and weathered railings. Water becomes visible to the left as the character steps onto the bridge. Ahead, an NPC stands facing away, creating a focal point as the camera approaches. The stormy sky is more visible over the open water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark forest trail that gradually opens up to a weathered stone bridge under a stormy night sky. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt path bordered by a stone wall, passing a wooden-barricaded well as a magical light on his shoulder casts dynamic shadows. As the path becomes more rugged, the camera moves between large rock outcroppings on the right and the receding stone wall on the left, before the terrain shifts back into dense forest vegetation. The scene then expands as the canopy thins to reveal the turbulent sky above, leading the character away from the woods and onto a cobblestone bridge. Finally, the camera glides over the bridge toward a solitary figure standing by the water, bringing the journey to a focal point.
